create.title: Create a
create.subtitle: Set the date and description, then add movies. The group will vote and you'll have a winner without drama.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the mood of the evening, the theme, or any detail that makes this proposal special…
create.descriptionHint: You can write a detailed description. It will be displayed in an expandable way.
create.validationError: Fill in all fields and select at least one movie to continue
create.readySubtitle: At least 1 movie required. More choices = more fun voting.
create.alertFillFields: Fill in all fields and select at least one movie

open.howItWorksText: Drag movies to reorder them: drop in the upper half to position above, in the lower half to tie. Or use the numbered buttons to directly assign a ranking. The system will automatically calculate the winner based on everyone's preferences.
open.votingClosed: Voting is closed. Results are visible below.
open.confirmVoteSubtitle: The vote is saved and results update in real time.
open.votingConcludedSubtitle: Thank you for participating in the vote!
open.voteError: Error during voting. Please try again.

closed.scheduledText: Voting is complete and the winning movie has been selected. After the screening date, you can create a new proposal for the next round.
